auth_token.description: Coda API token. Sent only as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>; never logged.

base_url.description: Coda API base URL override for tests or proxies.

doc_id.description: Coda doc id. Required for the doc-scoped streams (tables, pages, formulas, controls); ignored by the workspace-level docs stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
